text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! Just look at that bounty...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Mhm... Thing is, these Westerns I rented are due
back pretty soon.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I figured it'd be a real waste not to watch 'em all, so I went and pulled me an all-nighter. Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle looks sleep-deprived for the entire
rest of the day...
